---
pagetitle: Josh Leon - Home
output:
  html_document:
    theme: journal
---
<html>
<head>
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
```
<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 1800px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
</style>

<style>
  body {background-color:#d3d3d3;}
</style> 

<style>
div.white {background-color:#ffffff;}
</style>

<style>
h1 {color: black;
    font-size: 200%}
p  {color: black;
    font-size: 125%}
a  {font-size: 115%}

a:link {
  color: #000080;
  background-color: transparent;
  text-decoration: none;
}
a:visited {
  color: #000080;
  background-color: transparent;
  text-decoration: none;
}
a:hover {
  color: coral;
  background-color: transparent;
  text-decoration: underline;
}
a:active {
  color: coral;
  background-color: transparent;
  text-decoration: underline;
  font-size: 125%;
}
</style>


<div style = text-align:center;>
<br>
<a href="http://JLEON123.github.io">Homepage</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="http://JLEON123.github.io/portfolio/">Data Analytics</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="http://JLEON123.github.io">Research</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="http://JLEON123.github.io">Conferences</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="http://JLEON123.github.io">Publications</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="http://JLEON123.github.io">CV</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;
</div>

</head>

___

<h1><b>About Me</b></h1>  

<p> 
My name is Josh Leon and I am an undergraduate student at Utah Valley University. I am majoring in <a href="https://www.uvu.edu/catalog/current/departments/biology/bioinformatics-bs/">Bioinformatics</a> while also obtaining certificates in <a href="https://www.uvu.edu/catalog/current/departments/information-systems-and-technology/data-analytics-certificate-of-proficiency/">Data Analytics</a> and <a href="https://www.uvu.edu/catalog/current/departments/earth-science/geographic-information-systems-certificate-of-proficiency/">Geographic Information Systems (GIS)</a>.
</p>

I've had the opportunity to be a part of several research projects while attending UVU. I have gained experience and skills from these research projects which include:

- Collection of plant and soil samples in Capitol Reef National Park
- Water quality analyses of collected samples from rivers, lakes, and wastewater treatment plants
- Geospatial analyses of land cover and land use in the Utah Lake watershed
- Writing scripts in Bash and R to analyze microbial data from Mangrove samples
</p>

<div style= "float:right;position: relative;top:60px">
```{r, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics('./media/small_headshot.JPG')
```

</div>

<h1><b>Contact Info</b></h1>

<p>
Email: Joshuarleon0123@gmail.com  
Phone: (385)-447-7934  
GitHub: https://github.com/JLEON123  
</p>

</div>
</body>
</html>

a:link {
  color: #000080;
  background-color: transparent;
  text-decoration: none;
}
a:visited {
  color: #000080;
  background-color: transparent;
  text-decoration: none;
}
a:hover {
  color: coral;
  background-color: transparent;
  text-decoration: underline;
}
a:active {
  color: coral;
  background-color: transparent;
  text-decoration: underline;
  font-size: 125%;
}
